songs.title: Sue me
feed: “Sue me” by Audrey Hobert spends a 2nd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.

“Sue me” by Audrey Hobert is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 276,640 total units.

feed: “But Daddy I Love Him” by Taylor Swift reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 69 spots to #3.

“But Daddy I Love Him” by Taylor Swift is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 345% to 294 points.
“But Daddy I Love Him” by Taylor Swift is the biggest position gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 69 spots to #3.
“But Daddy I Love Him” by Taylor Swift is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 180 streams units.
“But Daddy I Love Him” by Taylor Swift is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 10 airplay units.
